actions.description: Create a session and/or dispatch a task.
actions.name: createSession

properties.description: Unique session identifier.
properties.name: id

properties.description: Current session lifecycle status.
properties.name: status

properties.description: The model tier used for this session.
properties.name: model

properties.description: When the session was created.
properties.name: createdAt

properties.description: When the session was last updated.
properties.name: updatedAt

properties.description: Auto-generated short title summarizing the task.
properties.name: title

properties.description: The agent's final output.
properties.name: output

properties.description: The JSON Schema that was requested for structured output, if any.
properties.name: outputSchema

properties.description: Number of steps the agent has executed so far.
properties.name: stepCount

properties.description: Human-readable summary of the most recent agent step.
properties.name: lastStepSummary

properties.description: Whether the task completed successfully.
properties.name: isTaskSuccessful

properties.description: URL to view the live browser session.
properties.name: liveUrl

properties.description: URLs to download session recordings.
properties.name: recordingUrls

properties.description: ID of the browser profile loaded in this session, if any.
properties.name: profileId

properties.description: ID of the workspace attached to this session, if any.
properties.name: workspaceId

properties.description: Country code of the proxy used for this session, or null if no proxy.
properties.name: proxyCountryCode

properties.description: Maximum cost limit in USD set for this session.
properties.name: maxCostUsd

properties.description: Total LLM input tokens consumed by this session.
properties.name: totalInputTokens

properties.description: Total LLM output tokens consumed by this session.
properties.name: totalOutputTokens

properties.description: Proxy bandwidth used in megabytes.
properties.name: proxyUsedMb

properties.description: Cost of LLM usage in USD.
properties.name: llmCostUsd

properties.description: Cost of proxy bandwidth in USD.
properties.name: proxyCostUsd

properties.description: Cost of browser compute time in USD.
properties.name: browserCostUsd

properties.description: Total session cost in USD (LLM + proxy + browser).
properties.name: totalCostUsd

properties.description: URL of the latest browser screenshot.
properties.name: screenshotUrl

properties.description: Temporary email address provisioned for this session (via AgentMail).
properties.name: agentmailEmail

properties.description: The natural-language instruction for the agent to execute.
properties.label: Task
properties.name: task

properties.description: The model to use.
properties.label: Model
properties.name: model

properties.description: Configure how the browser agent should return results.
properties.label: Output
properties.name: outputSchema

properties.description: Define the structure of data to extract from the browser task.
properties.label: Output Schema
properties.name: schema

properties.description: ID of an existing idle session to dispatch the task to.
properties.label: Session ID
properties.name: sessionId

properties.description: If true, the session stays alive in idle state after the task completes instead of automatically stopping.
properties.label: Keep Alive
properties.name: keepAlive

properties.description: If true, the agent can create scheduled tasks that run on a recurring basis.
properties.label: Enable Scheduled Tasks
properties.name: enableScheduledTasks

properties.description: If true, enables built-in agent skills.
properties.label: Skills
properties.name: skills

name: browserUse
title: Browser Use
